languages.text: "Гость на своем собственном корабле". {n}Себериан обводит рукой открывающийся с мостика вид и со скрежетом сжимает кулак. {/n} "Мне потребуется время, чтобы свыкнуться с этой мыслью".

traits.locale_text: "Гость на своем собственном корабле". {n}Себериан обводит рукой открывающийся с мостика вид и со скрежетом сжимает кулак. {/n} "Мне потребуется время, чтобы свыкнуться с этой мыслью".

languages.text: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."
languages.original_text: "Гость на своем собственном корабле". {n}Себериан обводит рукой открывающийся с мостика вид и со скрежетом сжимает кулак. {/n} "Мне потребуется время, чтобы свыкнуться с этой мыслью".

traits.locale_text: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I shall require time to grow accustomed to this notion."
"A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I shall require time to grow accustomed to this notion."
"A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."
"A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."

languages.text: "Ein Gast auf meinem eigenen Schiff." {n}Seberian deutet auf den Ausblick von der Brücke und ballt knirschend seine Faust.{/n} "Ich werde eine Weile brauchen, um mich daran zu gewöhnen."
languages.original_text: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."

traits.locale_text: "Ein Gast auf meinem eigenen Schiff." {n}Seberian deutet auf den Ausblick von der Brücke und ballt knirschend seine Faust.{/n} "Ich werde eine Weile brauchen, um mich daran zu gewöhnen."

languages.text: « Je suis un invité sur mon propre vaisseau. » {n}Seberian signale la vue depuis la passerelle de la main et serre le poing dans un grincement.{/n} « Il va me falloir un peu de temps pour l'accepter. »
languages.original_text: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis un invité sur mon propre vaisseau. » {n}Seberian signale la vue depuis la passerelle de la main et serre le poing dans un grincement.{/n} « Il va me falloir un peu de temps pour l'accepter. »

languages.text: «Ser visitante en mi propia nave». {n}Seberian gesticula hacia la vista del puente y, con un chirrido, aprieta el puño.{/n} «Tardaré un tiempo en poder aceptarlo».
languages.original_text: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."

traits.locale_text: «Ser visitante en mi propia nave». {n}Seberian gesticula hacia la vista del puente y, con un chirrido, aprieta el puño.{/n} «Tardaré un tiempo en poder aceptarlo».

languages.text: "Kendi gemimde misafirim." {n}Seberian, köprüden manzarayı işaret ediyor ve gıcırdayan bir sesle yumruğunu sıkıyor.{/n} "Bunu kabullenmek zaman alacak."
languages.original_text: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."

traits.locale_text: "Kendi gemimde misafirim." {n}Seberian, köprüden manzarayı işaret ediyor ve gıcırdayan bir sesle yumruğunu sıkıyor.{/n} "Bunu kabullenmek zaman alacak."

languages.text: “在自己的船上当客人。”{n}塞贝里安朝舰桥外的景象挥了下手，随后握紧拳头，发出刺耳的金属摩擦声。{/n}“我得花点时间消化这个事实。”
languages.original_text: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."

traits.locale_text: “在自己的船上当客人。”{n}塞贝里安朝舰桥外的景象挥了下手，随后握紧拳头，发出刺耳的金属摩擦声。{/n}“我得花点时间消化这个事实。”

languages.text: 「自分の船に客が乗っている」{n}シベリアはブリッジからの景色を指さし、拳を握り、歯ぎしりしながら言った。{/n}「この事実を受け入れるには時間がかかるだろう」
languages.original_text: "A guest upon my own ship." {n}Seberian gestures at the view from the bridge and clenches his fist with a grinding sound.{/n} "I will need time to come to terms with this."

traits.locale_text: 「自分の船に客が乗っている」{n}シベリアはブリッジからの景色を指さし、拳を握り、歯ぎしりしながら言った。{/n}「この事実を受け入れるには時間がかかるだろう」
